title: beat_sheet
description: The heart of every reel. Audio-first: narration (or a music bed) is the master clock; each beat is one moment with one visual slot. shot.type × shot.source annotate WHAT the beat is; the fill plan (see runtime/scripts/beat_plan.py) is derived from these fields. Edit the beat sheet, never the derived todo.json / STATUS.md.

voice_id.description: ElevenLabs voice ID; resolved from ELEVENLABS_VOICE_* in .env

clock.description: what times the reel (narration | music bed)

actual_duration_s.description: measured from the rendered audio; the real clock

new_visual_element.description: one-line label; used on slate/request cards and STATUS.md

prompt.description: explicit generation prompt / search terms; overrides the derived seed

remotion.description: a Remotion scene/pattern name for this beat

shot.description: The two-axis annotation. type = what kind of shot; source = who/what produces it. Together they drive the fill plan.

type.description: GRAPHIC (drawable) | AI-VIDEO | HISTORICAL-IMAGE | USER-CAPTURE | REMOTION | STILL | SLATE

source.description: own (pipeline animates) | archive/historical (human finds a real image) | capture/user (human records) | gen/ai (gen-AI clip)

graphic.description: For drawable beats: the named scene and/or a production_viz spec animated_graphics.py can render.

engine.description: which tool animates this beat; if absent, animated_graphics.py decides

mechanic.description: what to draw; also the seed for a gen-AI prompt if the beat is re-planned as ai-video
